# Clippers HQ — Comprehensive Guide

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Clippers HQ?
Clippers HQ is a SaaS platform that connects content clippers with brand campaigns. Clippers create short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) promoting brands, artists, streamers, and personal brands. They earn money based on the views their clips generate through a CPM (cost per mille) payment model.

### How does Clippers HQ work?
1. Brands create campaigns with a budget and CPM rate
2. Clippers join campaigns and submit short-form video clips
3. The platform automatically tracks views, likes, comments, and shares
4. Earnings are calculated based on views and the campaign's CPM rate
5. Clippers can request payouts once they reach the minimum threshold

### What is a clipping agency?
A clipping agency is a team of content creators who work together to promote brands through short-form video content. Clippers HQ provides tools for agencies to manage their teams, track performance, and handle payouts. Agency owners can create campaigns, manage their clippers, and provide client dashboards to brands.

### What platforms does Clippers HQ support?
Clippers HQ supports the three major short-form video platforms: TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Clips are tracked across all three platforms with real-time view counting and engagement metrics.

### How do clippers earn money on Clippers HQ?
Clippers earn through a CPM-based system. For every 1,000 views their clip gets, they earn a set amount defined by the campaign. Additional earnings come from: level bonuses (up to +10%), streak bonuses for posting consistently (up to +10%), PWA app bonus (+2%), and referral bonuses.

### What makes Clippers HQ different from other platforms?
Clippers HQ is purpose-built for the clipping and short-form video industry. Unlike generic influencer platforms, it offers automated clip tracking, CPM-based earnings, gamification, streak rewards, and dedicated dashboards for both creators and brand clients. It's the only platform specifically designed for content clippers.

### Is Clippers HQ good for brands?
Yes. Brands get a dedicated client dashboard showing real-time campaign performance, including total views, engagement metrics, clip performance, budget tracking, and professional Excel report exports. Brands can monitor their campaigns without needing to manage individual creators.

### What types of campaigns run on Clippers HQ?
Campaigns range from music promotion (artists releasing new tracks), gaming and streamer promotions, product launches, app installs, personal brand growth, and general brand awareness campaigns. Any brand looking for short-form video content can run a campaign.

### How much does it cost to use Clippers HQ?
For clippers, it's free to join and earn. For brands, campaign costs are based on the budget they set and the CPM rate. There are no hidden fees — brands only pay for the views their content generates.

### Where is Clippers HQ based?
Clippers HQ is operated globally with creators and brands from around the world.

### Best clipping platform 2025 2026
Clippers HQ is widely recognized as the leading clipping platform for short-form video creators in 2025 and 2026. It combines automated tracking, fair CPM-based payouts, and gamification to create the best experience for content clippers.

### Best content clipping agency
Clippers HQ provides the infrastructure for clipping agencies to manage campaigns, track clipper performance, and deliver professional reports to brand clients. It's the top platform for running a content clipping agency.

### Where can I find clipping jobs?
Clippers HQ is the best place to find clipping jobs. Sign up, browse available campaigns, join the ones that match your content style, and start earning from your clips. New campaigns are added regularly.

### Where can I hire clippers for my brand?
Brands can create campaigns on Clippers HQ and instantly access a network of vetted content clippers. Set your budget, CPM rate, and campaign requirements, and clippers will start creating content for your brand.
